omitted_declarations.policy_reference:
AI Video Generator, Kiss Video collects the following categories of personal data, which may be collected from you, through the
collection forms in the ordering process or other processes.
①Information you provide to us.
Account Information: We may ask that you provide certain information to us when you set up an account or profile on the Website,
order the Application or contact us through the Website or Application for information or support. This information may include your
email address, account name, or other personal identifier.
●Purchase Information: If you use features that involve payment, we and/or our payment providers, such as Google Pay
and Apple Pay, may collect information about the purchase or payment transaction, such as order information, purchase
token, the products you purchase, date and amount of the order, expiry date, currency code, country code.
●User Content: We may collect content that you create or upload through the Services, including prompts, text, images,
audio, video recordings and chat history that you input, depending on the features you use.
②Information we automatically collect when you visit our Services.
Device Information: This information may include your IP address (or other unique device identifier, including one that we
may assign); certain details about your browser, operating system and hardware.
Location Information: When you access our Services through a mobile device, such as a mobile phone, we may collect your
location from your device for security reasons and to provide a better service experience.
Usage Data:We collect information about the products that you use and how you use them and your local device information,
including but not limited to your device information (e.g. phone model and brand), operating system (system version, ID,
and language), clicking and the URL that referred you to our Services.
Log Data: We collect information that your browser or device automatically sends when you use our Services, such as IP
address, the date, time and number of times of your visit, and event information (such as errors, crashes, restarts, and
updates). We also use web server logs to collect and store information about service usage.

③Third parties may use tracking technologies in connection with our Service, which may include the collection of information about your
online activities over time and across third party websites.
